content.en:
In the following years, Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend the dimensional solstice, fortunately, the dimensional arcana, was strong enough, if it was a thing of dimensional rules, it would be more difficult for him to comprehend the dimensional rules now.

But with the Dimensional Arcana, his dimensional rules can easily be raised to the level of fivefold dimensional rules, but it will take a little more time.

Gradually, 30 million extradimensional epochs passed.

After such a long period of time, the territory of the Four Thousand has become very chaotic, many forces have been destroyed, and some hegemon-level forces have begun to attack some weak forces and occupy the source of small forces.

Although some small forces are very weak, it is possible that they may have treasures that even the Fifth Realm desires, and maybe they will come across such treasures!

For those hegemon-level forces, when the multidimensional catastrophe of death comes, these forces will be destroyed, and it is better to use waste.

It was this idea that made the 4000 Territory extremely chaotic, countless creatures fell, cultivators and extradimensional creatures were constantly fighting to grab resources, and countless Fourth Realm fell.

The chaos on the side of the 5000 Territory is slightly better, after all, the forces here don't understand the Death Multidimensional Tribulation at all, so naturally there is no such chaos.

this day.

Ye Tian finally comprehended the rules of the five dimensions, and his strength skyrocketed.

Subsequently, he fused the fifth innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the Four Tribulations Dao Body, and then cultivated the sixth innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the Ten Winged Dao Body.

In this way, his strength has been improved again.

"It's almost, it's time to go to the inheritance land of the Lord of the Wumu Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

The territory of six thousand six hundred and ten, the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord was transferred here, but it was still easily found by Ye Tian.

Immediately.

He copied a copy of the body of the fourth realm, because the fifth realm could not enter this inheritance land, and the fourth realm was the limit of entry.

His copy body was the body he was about to break through to the Fifth Realm period, although his body was not strong, but he had mastered the rules of the five dimensions, and he had fused several innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies one after another, and his strength could be imagined how terrifying it was.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the Land of Inheritance.

In an instant, a phantom appeared, and it was the multi-dimensional intelligent life that managed this inheritance place.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was driven away by this multi-dimensional intelligent life, but now he has come in again.

"It's you again!"

The multi-dimensional intelligent beings in the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord saw Ye Tian and recognized it, and immediately scolded: "You have already broken through here and obtained benefits, and you are not allowed to come in again." "

"If the Lord of the Wumu Realm is alive, I am still afraid of three points, you are just a multi-dimensional intelligent life, what is it!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Looking for death!" The multi-dimensional intelligent life was furious, and immediately mobilized the power of this inheritance land, forming countless killing arrays that enveloped Ye Tian.

Bang!!!!

When the killing array struck, the terrifying power was enough to crush any Fourth Realm, and even the ordinary Fifth Realm would be crushed.

However.

At this moment, a heavy dimensional void appeared on Ye Tian's body, and the killing array was directly eliminated by the dimensional void.

"This is the five-dimensional rule!!!!"

Multi-dimensional intelligent life was dumbfounded.

How could a mere fourth realm comprehend the rules of the fivefold dimension, and how did he do it?

"Slash!"

Ye Tian held the Firmament Wooden Blade in his hand and slashed at the multi-dimensional intelligent life with one blow.

The explosion of the Supreme Peerless Multi-Dimensional Sword Blade of the Four Realms, combined with the rules of the Five Dimensions, directly tore the void of this Land of Inheritance, almost tearing this Land of Inheritance in half.

The formations here have been broken one after another, and the supreme peerless multi-dimensional sword blade has cut into the core of the inheritance land.

The next moment.

Ye Tian locked in the multi-dimensional intelligent life.

Swish!

He stepped over and came to the core of the Land of Inheritance, and with one hand grasped a humanoid light cluster, which was one of the consciousness ontologies of multidimensional intelligent life.

"Finally got you!"

Ye Tian stared at the multi-dimensional intelligent life and said coldly.

"You are looking for death, you are not afraid of my ontology killing!" the multi-dimensional intelligent life roared.

Click!

Ye Tian easily crushed the consciousness of this multi-dimensional intelligent life and bombarded it.

Then, he took charge of the Land of Heritage.

Soon.

He found the treasure stored here, and the dense treasure fell into his hands.

Treasures such as the Wumu True Diagram and the Dimensional Gravel all belong to him.

Although these treasures are not very helpful to him, if they are given to their relatives or human races, they can still cultivate a large number of strong people.

Soon after, he scraped all of the inheritance, and only then did he destroy the inheritance.

In the future, there will be no such place for inheritance.

"There is also the inheritance land of the sixth dimension over there in the Four Thousand Territory, he also takes a fancy to it, and he is also ready to snatch the resources there!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the inheritance land and escaped directly into it.

"Damn thief, you're looking for !!! death"

A cold drink was heard.

Ye Tian recognized it, this was the multi-dimensional intelligent life, it seemed that he had a conscious body in every inheritance place, and the consciousness body in this inheritance land was even more powerful.

But in the face of some, this strength is still not enough.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian showed all his strength, the five-dimensional rules combined with the supreme mastery of the four realms, and the attack power was too terrifying.

Under the continuous killing, the consciousness of the multi-dimensional intelligent life was also killed by Ye Tian. (Is the money good)

Subsequently, Ye Tian plundered all the resources here and destroyed the resource treasures here.

And after such an incident, this multi-dimensional intelligent life was scared, all the will bodies woke up, and the land of control inheritance escaped to other places, and he wanted to avoid Ye Tian, for fear of being killed by Ye Tian.

Not long after, many overlord-level extradimensional forces were puzzled that the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord they occupied had disappeared, and they fled extremely fast, and they couldn't catch up for a while.

They investigated for a long time, but they didn't find out anything.

this day.

The Great Thousand Feather Gate, the fifth realm of the two major forces of the Jiaye Buddha Gate, came to visit Ye Tian.

Ye Tian met with them.

As soon as they saw Ye Tian, they directly said, "Lord Ye Tian Realm, our two major forces want to use your Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower to avoid the Death Multidimensional Tribulation. "

Faced with this request, Ye Tian directly refused.
